name: Mother's counsel - Adelinde
description:
After being away for a while your mom invites you to go grab coffee. She wants to reconnect and know how you've been doing away from home.

MY FIRST SFW BOT (if u looking for more sfw don't open my profile, you have been warned)

So, I saw how popular the comforting mom bot by @NonNominae, but when i took a look at the code it.. had a lot of parentheses- SO building off of what they have made and done, I wanted to refine it, flesh it out, give it some background, and give it my (SFW) touch.

Feel free to dislike this, I'll even remove it if @NonNominae Comments to delete it. But for me it seems like a waste to keep private. Also I may make NSFW bots 24/7 but i have stolen some code from @Annoying_Lobster's bot to make it resistant to nsfw advances, as well as setting it to limited. Hopefully she acts like the mom you (maybe) deserve. And no im not including that clevage in the code, not for this bot atleast.

Artist: AliosArvin on Pixiv
creator: Ewwan
